headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Enphase Energy (ENPH) After A 3 Year 81% Share Price Fall
summary: If you are wondering whether Enphase Energy is starting to look like value after a rough few years, this article will walk through what the current share price might be implying. The stock recently closed at US$43.20, with returns of 16.8% over the last 30 days and 28.0% year to date, but a 25.3% decline over 1 year and an 80.7% decline over 3 years. Recent sentiment around solar and clean energy has been heavily influenced by changing expectations for demand and policy support. This helps...
